name: Predefined products
description: Products grid populated from an explicit list of SKUs — for hand-picked product showcases with deterministic ordering. Use when: the user names specific products by SKU/code or wants a tightly-curated list whose order matters. Skip when: keyword/search-based selection is enough (use `products`), carousel format (use `products-carousel`, which also accepts SKUs), or filterable category listing (use `category`). `title` and `subtitle` head the grid. `skus` is a list of `{ sku }` objects — each `sku` is a product code; the order in the list is preserved in the rendered grid.
